description: Legal document draft leaving the date blank, written by Avraham b. Yiṣḥaq ha-Talmid. On verso part of a rough draft record of testimony by Avraham b. Yiṣḥaq Ha-Talmid. Contains the trustee stipulation for a woman, and the end of the stipulation regarding the wife's earnings. The husband is taking upon himslef not to marry another wife, nor to act violently against his wife. Written by Avraham b. Aharon ha-mumhe.
description_he: טיוטת מסמך משפטי שהתאריך נשאר ריק, מאת אברהם בן יצחק התלמיד. כולל תנאי אמון עבור אישה.
